message:
feat(mux): remove smol dependency, add async-smol/async-asupersync feature gates (ft-3kxe)

Drop the direct smol crate dependency from frankenterm/mux. Introduce
two new mutually exclusive features — async-smol and async-asupersync —
across config, termwiz-funcs, and mux Cargo.toml files, forming a
feature propagation chain through the dependency graph.

In mux/src/lib.rs, add a compile_error! guard enforcing exactly one
async runtime feature is active, preventing accidental dual-runtime
builds.

In mux/src/localpane.rs, replace smol::channel::{bounded, Receiver,
TryRecvError} with std::sync::mpsc::{sync_channel, Receiver,
TryRecvError}. The smol channel's try_send is replaced with std
channel's send on a dedicated thread, removing the last direct smol
dependency from the mux layer.

This is the mux-layer portion of the smol decoupling work enabling
the asupersync runtime swap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,6 +16,12 @@ default = ["lua"]
 lua = ["dep:luahelper", "dep:mlua"]
 no-lua = []
 distro-defaults = []
+async-smol = ["frankenterm-ssh/async-smol"]
+async-asupersync = [
+    "async-smol",
+    "promise/async-asupersync",
+    "frankenterm-ssh/async-asupersync",
+]
 
 [dependencies]
 anyhow.workspace = true

@@ -7,8 +7,10 @@ publish = false
 # See more keys and their definitions at https://doc.rust-lang.org/cargo/reference/manifest.html
 
 [features]
-default = ["lua"]
+default = ["lua", "async-smol"]
 lua = ["dep:luahelper", "dep:mlua", "config/lua"]
+async-smol = ["config/async-smol"]
+async-asupersync = ["config/async-asupersync"]
 
 [dependencies]
 anyhow.workspace = true

@@ -8,9 +8,15 @@ publish = false
 # See more keys and their definitions at https://doc.rust-lang.org/cargo/reference/manifest.html
 
 [features]
-default = ["lua"]
+default = ["lua", "async-smol"]
 lua = ["dep:luahelper", "dep:mlua", "config/lua", "procinfo/lua"]
 no-lua = ["config/no-lua"]
+async-smol = ["config/async-smol", "frankenterm-ssh/async-smol"]
+async-asupersync = [
+    "config/async-asupersync",
+    "promise/async-asupersync",
+    "frankenterm-ssh/async-asupersync",
+]
 
 [dependencies]
 anyhow.workspace = true
@@ -43,7 +49,6 @@ rangeset.workspace = true
 serde = {workspace=true, features = ["rc", "derive"]}
 serial2.workspace = true
 shell-words.workspace = true
-smol.workspace = true
 terminfo.workspace = true
 termwiz.workspace = true
 textwrap.workspace = true
